name: Craig and Lisa Dotson
body: When you just don’t have the words, there’s always a song that does: “In Jesus Name (God of Possible)” by Katy Nichole - for you and your family, along with our continued prayers. 🙏🏼💕

name: Michael Dawn Anderson
body: Everyday at noon, I ask God for a miracle for Lyla and for your family. He is the God of miracles!

name: DeShanna Kennard
body: I'm so very heartbroken to hear this. I don't know the words to say other than Jim and I continue to pray for your family. May God be merciful to your precious Lyla.

name: Kathy Laub
body: Lee thank you so much for writing this and all your updates. You are blessing us. And thank you for the link to the playlist. Praying for you all.

name: Charlie Pagnard
body: Praying for your and Lyla every day!

name: Linda Share
body: I will continue to pray for your sweet daughter and your family.

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: (I swear, I didn’t hit that “send button”, EVER, till this one coming up!!)

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: Charlotte

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: Charlotte

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: With love,

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: 😏 Thanks for sharing your raw thoughts and emotions. Praying for you 4 this morning, that God will meet each of you where you have need today. I think I will set my alarm, and pray with you during your time zone’s noon each day. May God bless your sweet family in this new year, and I agree, and say “amen”, to the one’s prayer who interceded on Lyla’s and your behalf, before my string of comments.

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: There I go again! 😂🤷‍♀️

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: There I go again! 😂🤷‍♀️

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: Somehow, I sent off my comment prematurely. I wanted to say how much it meant to be reminded where our hope ultimately lies, regardless of what things look like. (Thanks, Kayla.). And, thank you, Lee, for sharing the song….a good one for me to hear this morning.

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: Somehow, I sent off my comment prematurely. I wanted to say how much it meant to be reminded where our hope ultimately lies, regardless of what things look like. (Thanks, Kayla.). And, thank you, Lee, for sharing the song….a good one for me to hear this morning.

name: Charlotte Canakes
body: They SAY we ought to live each day as if it’s our last. Easy to forget, or even hard to “pretend”, till in a place like where you’re at, I guess. What sweet gifts Lyla put together for each of you. I so hate that you’re having to go through such a “hard” as this, but i keep remembering how grateful i was, with my first substantial “hard”, to learn who our God truly is, and it’s beautiful to see how He’s used all this in your life, too. Makes me sad that your “hard” is so severe. I’m soooo happy to hear that you’re going to Mayo. I will be praying for wisdom and insight for Lyla’s doctors there.

name: Graham Geisler
body: Oh, Lord, only You are good, but if Lee could heal his daughter, he would - right now. He isn't better than You, or more kind or merciful than You are, but Jesus said even an evil man knows how to give a piece of bread to his child instead of a stone. But Your goodness and mercy exceeds us all. Please be merciful in new and surprising ways to these parents and their daughter. Show forth Your glory in the healing of this young girl, just like you healed many in the Scriptures. Please, oh, Lord. You are the only God. Please show that in the healing of this young girl.

name: Mills Nicole
body: I have been thinking about you all over the holidays. Happy belated birthday miss Lyla. If there is anything I can do for you guys please let me know. Not sure if Lyla remembers my little grandson (Levi) or not from last year he iwas always with me when I stop by for a visit to the school. But we found out that he's going to be a big brother in mid-May to a little sister. I will send you Lee a picture of him through your Facebook page. I will continue to pray for you all in your travels, appointments, procedures and recovery. Hugs to you all.

name: Kim Nadolsky
body: Continues prayers for all of you.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Tears reading this. I continue to pray for you all consistently, especially over the holidays and her bday. Love you all so much.
